projection_interface.actual_incidence: I subseteq Z_T x T_z, where Z_T is exactly the incident slope image
projection_interface.aggregated_target_rule: if targets vary, retain z in the side projection key before applying mu_G
projection_interface.full_MCA_guardrail: if a complete MCA slope has degree zero from the chosen marked family, then H=0 on the complete slope set and this bound is inapplicable

projection_degrees.H: min_(gamma in Z_T) deg_I(gamma), with H>=1 by declared exhaustivity
